data.body: Remove .tickets/*.md v2 fixture creation from sprint/classify script tests. Replace with v3 event-sourced setup. Files: test-sprint-next-batch.sh (remove .tickets/*.md printf writes at lines 48,116,176,304-306), test-sprint-list-epics.sh (update test 19), test-classify-task.sh (remove TICKETS_DIR .tickets/ export). TDD Requirement: T4 must be complete first. After task: run tests, confirm test_no_v2_md_fixture_writes guard passes GREEN.
